title: Build route detail screen with full map view

typecheck.note: Pre-existing errors in route-polyline.test.tsx and stories - not related to US-015

lint.note: ESLint broken project-wide: react-native plugin not found in eslint 9.x config

tests.pre_existing_failures: 10 suites / 5 tests fail without US-015 changes

acceptance_criteria.AC1: Screen renders MapView with polylines, header with name, stats (distance/duration/legs), weather badges
acceptance_criteria.AC2: Loading state shows ActivityIndicator when data is undefined
acceptance_criteria.AC3: Wind-only route: WindBadge shows level, RainBadge/TempBadge show unavailable
acceptance_criteria.AC4: Null data shows 'Route not found' message with back navigation button
acceptance_criteria.AC5: Back button calls router.back() via MapHeaderOverlay leftAction
